_comment_1: Configuration for build_cfo_workbook.py — edit to update behavior without code changes.
_comment_2: Add new episodes to episode_classifications when new procedures are introduced.
_comment_3: Adjust addressable_pct values if BPCI/CJR/state Medicaid program results inform a refinement.
_addressable_note: Addressable percentages reflect Frank's face-validity framework: Standard episodes (tight procedure list, diagnosis not the driver) have outliers that are real performance gaps. Heterogeneous episodes (bundled procedures/diagnoses) carry definitional variance that engagement cannot resolve. Defaults below are conservative and calibrated against BPCI Advanced / CJR / Maryland TCOC first-cycle outcomes.
_filter_note: Volume filter at 5 suppresses small-n statistical noise; facilities with vol < 5 produce unstable O:E ratios. O:E threshold 1.10 = 10% above risk-adjusted expected cost.
_systemic_note: Facilities outlier in 3+ distinct episodes are flagged as systemic — operational patterns transcending any single procedure.
